    Module: cor_tabular

    module-cor-tabular.Rmd

    Purpose

    cor_tabular generates tabular summaries of CoR marker distributions, including geometric mean titres, response rates, and cross-tabulations stratified by case/non-case status for each CoR timepoint.

    Source module: correlates_reporting2/cor_tabular/
    Key report: cor_tabular/report.Rmd

    Example data 

    report_root  <- "/path/to/correlates_reporting2"
moderna_path <- file.path(
  report_root, "data_clean",
  "moderna_mock_data_processed_with_riskscore.csv"
)
janssen_path <- file.path(
  report_root, "data_clean",
  "janssen_pooled_mock_data_processed_with_riskscore.csv"
)

    Reproduce the report

    1. Configure the session 

    library(utilrep2)

report_root <- "/path/to/correlates_reporting2"
setup_session(
  trial       = "moderna_mock",
  platform    = "linux",
  data_path   = file.path(report_root, "data_clean"),
  report_root = report_root
)

    2. Run the module 

    run_cor_tabular(trial = "moderna_mock")

    For moderna_mock this runs make_table_all.R for D29 and D57.

    setup_session(trial = "janssen_pooled_mock",
              data_path = file.path(report_root, "data_clean"))
run_cor_tabular(trial = "janssen_pooled_mock")

    3. Build the chapter PDF 

    build_chapter_report("cor_tabular", trial = "moderna_mock")

    Output

    Tables are saved as .Rdata and .pdf under cor_tabular/output/<trial>/.

    Report sections (from report.Rmd)

    • GMT and GMR tables stratified by case/non-case
    • Response rate tables for each CoR timepoint
    • Cross-tabulation of marker positivity

    Supported trials

    Trial family CoR timepoints Script
    moderna_mock, moderna_real D29, D57 make_table_all.R
    janssen_pooled_mock / EUA D29, D29start1 make_table_all.R
    janssen_pooled_partA / partA variants IncludeNotMolecConfirmed variants make_table_all.R
    hvtn705 variants D210 make_table_all.R
    azd1222, azd1222_bAb D29, D57 make_table_all.R
    profiscov D43, D91 make_table_all.R
    prevent19_stage2 Delta/severe variants make_table_all_stg2.R
    azd1222_stage2 Delta/severe nAb/bAb make_table_all_stg2_azd.R
    id27hpv, id27hpvnAb M18 variants make_table_all_hpv.R
    covail variants D15–D181 windows make_table_all_covail*.R
    vat08_combined D22/D43 nAb/bAb make_table_all_sanofi.R
    iliad_ib202p C0 variants make_table_all_iliad_ib202p.R

    Developed by Y H.

    Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
